sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports having diabetes and a history of smoking one to two cigarettes per day. He also reports a grade two out of six systolic ejection murmur. The patient reports feeling fine overall.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally. The abdomen is soft and non-tender. Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has diabetes, hypertension, and a history of smoking. Hepatitis C is confirmed.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order hepatitis C RNA and HCV genotype testing. Schedule an ultrasound elastography to assess liver fibrosis. Refer to family physician for follow-up and management of diabetes and smoking cessation.
